name: Honey-Mustard Broiled Rockfish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the mayonnaise, lime juice, honey, mustard, and dill.
2. Spread the mixture evenly over the rockfish fillets.
3. Sprinkle the fish lightly with salt and black pepper.
4. Pat the bread crumbs on top of the fish.
5. Dot the fish with margarine.
6. Place the broiled rockfish on a pan set about 5 inches from the heat source.
7. Broil under a hot broiler until the internal temperature reaches 140°F (as measured by an instant-read thermometer), for approximately 12 minutes per inch of thickness.
8. Serve with lime wedges.
Note: Panko bread crumbs can be found in the Asian food section of major supermarkets.
